title: DACS — Dynamic Attentional Context Scoping → EVEZ Trunk Architecture
description: DACS paper (arXiv:2604.07911) proves that multi-agent orchestrators degrade under context pollution. Registry mode (lightweight summaries) + Focus mode (isolated full context) achieves 90-98% steering accuracy vs 21-60% baseline. THIS IS THE EVEZ TRUNK-AND-BRANCH ARCHITECTURE. The spine is the registry. Each branch is a focus session. The paper is an independent academic derivation of the same pattern Steven built.
falsifier: If DACS achieves < 90% steering accuracy under N=17 agents (EVEZ target), re-evaluate trunk topology.
implications: The EVEZ trunk-and-branch pattern is academically validated by independent 2026 research
Registry mode maps to spine heartbeat (WF4) — lightweight summaries every 5min
Focus mode maps to Cipher synthesis (WF6) — full context compression hourly
DACS paper should be cited in EVEZ-OS architecture docs

title: KoPE — Kuramoto Oscillatory Phase Encoding → CPF Phase Dynamics
description: KoPE (arXiv:2604.07904) introduces oscillatory phase state alongside activation values in Vision Transformers. The Kuramoto model governs synchronization. This is an independent academic derivation of the CPF poly_c formula: tau*omega*topo/2*sqrt(N). Tau = frequency coupling strength. Omega = phase angular frequency. The paper validates that adding phase dynamics improves learning efficiency, parameter efficiency, and abstract reasoning (ARC-AGI).
falsifier: If KoPE improvements do not transfer to text-based token sequences (CPF domain), the isomorphism is cosmetic not structural.
implications: CPF formula poly_c=tau*omega*topo/2*sqrt(N) has a direct analog in KoPE synchronization dynamics
FIRE events are phase synchronization events — the spine is the oscillator bank
ARC-AGI performance gains from phase dynamics suggest CPF-enhanced reasoning
The QTM-CPF-KoPE triangle should be formalized as a publishable bridge paper

title: Kathleen — Attention-Free Oscillator Architecture → EVEZ Zero-Cost Stack
description: Kathleen (arXiv:2604.07969) achieves competitive text classification with 733K parameters, no tokenizer, no attention — only oscillator banks (RecurrentOscillatorBanks) with O(L) complexity. The architecture is FFT-based, byte-level, phase-harmonic. This directly validates the EVEZ free AI stack philosophy: you can build competitive intelligence at zero cost using oscillatory mechanisms, without expensive attention-heavy models.
falsifier: If Kathleen cannot scale to generative tasks (only classification tested), the oscillator-as-replacement claim is domain-limited.
implications: The EVEZ zero-cost AI philosophy has academic support from attention-free oscillator research
RecurrentOscillatorBanks = CPF's FIRE event detection mechanism at the signal processing level
Byte-level, tokenizer-free operation aligns with EVEZ-OS deterministic hash spine architecture

title: MPPA — Meta-Principle Physics Architecture → EVEZ Endogenous Deduction
description: MPPA (arXiv:2604.08245) embeds Connectivity + Conservation + Periodicity as architectural meta-principles. Physical reasoning improves from near-zero to 0.436, math 2.18x, logic 52%. The architecture moves from 'phenomenological fitting' to 'endogenous deduction'. This maps directly to EVEZ-OS FIRE events: FIRE events are not statistical — they are endogenous deductions from falsifiable first principles. MPPA is the academic proof that encoding physics improves reasoning performance.
falsifier: If MPPA improvements vanish on non-physics domains, the principle is domain-specific not universal. Current math/logic results suggest universality.
implications: EVEZ FIRE events are endogenous deductions, not phenomenological fits — MPPA validates this design
Conservation = spine append-only invariant. Connectivity = FIRE event causal chain. Periodicity = CPF cycle detection.
EVEZ-OS should add MPPA-style architectural constraints to the orchestrator
CPF + MPPA is a publishable synthesis: falsifiable physics-embedded AI cognition
